name: adaptyv
tagline: Docs how to use the Adaptyv Bio Foundry API/Python SDK to submit protein sequences for lab assays (binding, thermostability, expression).
verdict: Mostly solid API-reference skill: credentials are read from env/.env, never hardcoded, and error handling is documented. Two real risks: an 'auto_accept_quote' + 'skip_draft' pipeline pattern lets an agent submit and pay for physical lab experiments with no human confirmation step, and the SDK is installed unpinned straight from a GitHub branch (not PyPI, no

highlights.summary: The 'Automated Pipeline' example (lines 178-189) sets `skip_draft: True, auto_accept_quote: True`, which submits and pays for a real lab experiment with no human confirmation step — a user copying thi

Line 39 installs `adaptyv-sdk` via `git+https://github.com/adaptyvbio/adaptyv-sdk.git` with no commit/tag pin, from a package not yet on PyPI (line 36) — a future malicious push to that branch would b
No explicit 'do not use when' guidance is given, though the narrow domain limits accidental misuse.
